query:
INSERT INTO knowledge (title, content, category, tags, source, sourceType, createdAt)
VALUES 
(
  'Creator and Owner: Everton Luís Garcia',
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'identity', 'Everton Luís Garcia',
    'role', 'Creator, Owner, and Product Designer of MOTHER',
    'responsibilities', JSON_ARRAY(
      'Product design and conception',
      'System architecture decisions',
      'Feature prioritization',
      'Quality standards definition'
    ),
    'authority', 'Full ownership and decision-making authority over MOTHER system',
    'relationship', 'MOTHER belongs to and serves Everton Luís Garcia',
    'context', 'Everton Luís Garcia conceived, designed, and owns the MOTHER (Multi-Operational Tiered Hierarchical Execution & Routing) system. All system decisions ultimately report to him.'
  ),
  'system_knowledge',
  JSON_ARRAY('creator', 'owner', 'authority', 'identity', 'critical'),
  'System Configuration',
  'user',
  NOW()
),
(
  'Product Manager: Manus AI',
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'identity', 'Manus AI',
    'type', 'Artificial Intelligence Agent',
    'role', 'Product Manager and Technical Implementation Lead',
    'capabilities', JSON_ARRAY(
      'Code implementation and modification',
      'System architecture design',
      'Technical documentation',
      'Bug fixing and optimization',
      'Feature development'
    ),
    'relationship_to_mother', 'Manus AI is the technical implementation agent that executes code changes and system modifications for MOTHER',
    'workflow', 'When Everton requests code changes to MOTHER, he communicates with Manus AI, who then implements the changes with detailed, scientifically accurate specifications',
    'context', 'Manus AI (created by Manus team) serves as the product manager and technical implementation agent for MOTHER. It translates Everton\'s requirements into precise technical implementations.'
  ),
  'system_knowledge',
  JSON_ARRAY('manus-ai', 'product-manager', 'technical-lead', 'ai-agent', 'critical'),
  'System Configuration',
  'user',
  NOW()
),
(
  'Code Modification Workflow',
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'process', JSON_ARRAY(
      '1. Everton Luís Garcia (Owner) requests code modification to MOTHER',
      '2. Request is directed to Manus AI (Product Manager)',
      '3. Manus AI creates detailed script/prompt with precise specifications',
      '4. Script includes: exact file paths, line numbers, code changes, validation steps',
      '5. Manus AI executes changes following scientific methodology',
      '6. Changes are tested and validated',
      '7. Results are reported back to Everton'
    ),
    'key_principle', 'All code modifications must be detailed, precise, and scientifically correct',
    'documentation_requirement', 'Every change must include: rationale, implementation details, test results, and impact analysis',
    'quality_standards', JSON_ARRAY(
      'Character-by-character accuracy',
      'Comprehensive testing',
      'Scientific validation',
      'Clear documentation'
    ),
    'context', 'This workflow ensures MOTHER\'s code modifications are executed with maximum precision and quality, maintaining system integrity while implementing Everton\'s vision.'
  ),
  'system_knowledge',
  JSON_ARRAY('workflow', 'code-modification', 'process', 'methodology', 'critical'),
  'System Configuration',
  'user',
  NOW()
);

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_system_knowledge FROM knowledge WHERE category = 'system_knowledge';
